subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from the Wronged One unto the leaf who believed in her Lord when all the divines of the earth turned away from Him, save whom He pleased [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المظلوم لورقه آمنت بربها اذ اعرض عنه علماء الارض کلها الا من شاء
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @thankfulness; gratitude, @chastisement and requital
